title: Google I/O 2026: 3 things you need to know
summary: Google announced Gemini Spark, a contextual AI assistant that integrates directly into Gmail, Drive, and Calendar with preloaded context. Unlike Claude Cowork and Codex, it requires minimal setup and is positioned for everyday users rather than power users.
